title: Client Data Intake & Profile Construction
description: Extract and structure all confirmed client facts for Paul and Margaret Chen into the canonical client-profile section. This includes: income sources (Paul's $210k salary + $25k bonus, Margaret's $48k part-time salary, $2,400/mo net rental income from Glendale condo), complete asset inventory (Paul's 401k $1.24M at Fidelity 80/20, Margaret's 401k $310k at Vanguard TDF 2030, Paul's Roth IRA $88k, taxable brokerage $420k, primary residence $1.65M, rental condo $580k), liabilities (primary mortgage $310k at 3.1% fixed with 18 years remaining), insurance coverage inventory and gaps (Paul's 2x employer life, no private policies, no LTC for either spouse), and retirement timeline targets (Paul 63, Margaret 62, $12,000/mo after-tax goal). Out of scope: analysis or recommendations—this task is purely data extraction and structuring.
